surface_verification.justification: Test-hygiene cleanup: resolves 51 pre-existing skipped-test inventory findings (CI-guard conversions, allow-markers, 2 dead-decorator removals, 1 no-op-stub delete) + one adopt-lib skip-inventory scanner refinement. Test-only edits + one scanner scope change; NO product/source, API, store, SSE/WS or UI code touched, so spec_impact is none and the E2E/cross-layer gates do not fire. Verified via the Python suites (shared/tests 4412, adopt 415, iterate 476, grade 385, compliance 1119) + the exact producing scanner re-run (repo_wide_skip_inventory: 51 -> 0) + ruff.

behaviors.behavior: git/uv/coverage skips loud-fail in CI (body-level guard) instead of silently skipping (CI-GUARD)
behaviors.evidence: converted suites run unconditionally where the binary exists: test_check_agent_doc_budget.py (15) + test_hooks_json_registration.py (12) + test_combine_coverage.py (13) PASSED

behaviors.behavior: grade _strict()->is_ci() rename makes the scanner recognize the already-correct CI-gated-fail guard, behavior unchanged
behaviors.evidence: test_empirical.py collects clean (12) + inventory drops the two sites; tuple order irrelevant for `in`

behaviors.behavior: stale skipif(not vite-hono.json.exists()) removed -> the 2 tests run unconditionally (REMOVE-DEAD)
behaviors.evidence: test_stack_detector_multi_service.py 11 PASSED (both previously-skipped tests now run green); vite-hono.json confirmed present

behaviors.behavior: 28 genuinely-conditional skips carry an allow-silent-skip marker; the inventory is silent on them but suites still skip correctly locally
behaviors.evidence: repo_wide_skip_inventory == 0 (exercises _line_is_suppressed on every marker incl. the 2 multi-line block-comment markers) + touched suites green with only the correct conditional skips

behaviors.behavior: no-op pass stub deleted; its scenario stays covered at the cmd_start layer (DELETE, no coverage lost)
behaviors.evidence: test_start_port_busy_no_state_errors_no_kill PASSES + zero references to the deleted test id; the stub was @pytest.mark.skip + pass (zero runtime coverage before/after)

behaviors.behavior: a fixtures/ dir UNDER a tests/ tree is pruned from the inventory; a fixtures/ dir OUTSIDE a tests tree is still scanned (SCANNER-FIX, narrowed)
behaviors.evidence: new test_traceability_baseline.py::test_enumerate_prunes_fixtures_only_under_a_tests_tree asserts both directions (real rot under top-level fixtures/ still flagged; tests/fixtures data silent)

behaviors.behavior: full pre-existing skip inventory clears end-to-end
